itemListElement.reviewBody:
Over the past 7 years at SNBP International School, I've learned a lot and grown a lot too. The classrooms are all set up really well with new things, and the library has tons of books for everything you can imagine. The teachers are really nice and helpful, always happy to explain things and make sure you understand. They make learning fun!

There are a few things that could be even better though. The bathrooms could be cleaner and nicer for the students. Also, the football field could be improved. If it had a larger ground and better equipment, playing games would be much more fun.

Overall, SNBP International School is a great place for your ward. With a few improvements, it could be even better!
I love this school, teachers expand the concept and help student learn efficiently
Washrooms are too dirty and not cleaned by the cleaning staff regularly. Even drinking water coolers dispense yellowish coloured water with some particles floating in it.

Not good at all(atleast for boys).

Most teachers complain ONLY about boys,
Though most of the noise is from girls.
And most teachers complain about boys for very small things.
And teachers have fun with girls, ONLY GIRLS.

There are some good teachers(27%) who don't complain only about boys.

Before going to this school,
I was very fluent at english,
After going to this school,
I could not speak english fluently.

This school teaches things that are never going to be used in the future.

Most of the activities get cancelled
Or are very boring.

In sports(once a week & for 25 mins), We don't get to choose the game that we want to play, We only get to play Dodgeball, FOR 2 YEARS IN A ROW(for me)!

In art(also once a week & for 25 mins),
We only get to paint 3 paintings In 2 Months!

In dance(also once a week & for 25 mins),
The teachers choose trending hindi songs(which are not that good) Or they choose some random songs that they found at the bottom of the search result(most of them sound like they were made in a jungle)

I've been in this school for 6+ years,
I Do Not Recommend This School For Boys.
For girls, Also would not recommend.

My daughter is studying in class 1st in this school, as on date. Our overall experience is very poor due to the following reasons:
1) zero focus by teachers, coordinators, principal and owners
2) entire space occupied by buildings to run International, CBSE and state boards to maximize students and revenue. Total designed strength is more than 7000 students. It is money making machine.
3) Teachers are highly incompetent, may be because of salaries or other internal reasons of school. The teaching style is to write on board by teacher and copying by students in their copies, for every subject including maths, PT and Computers
4) There are lot of other points, overall situation is deteriorating year on year. My daughter started at Sr. Kg in SNBP school.
5) Lastly the two most important parameters learning and overall attitude. With experience, learning in my child is almost zero and her overall attitude has become casual.
My suggestion to parents. Kindly avoid this school, please. Fee difference with good schools after the hike in 2024 is not more than 2000 per month. Do not go by marketing of the school. School spend money on marketing only. Kindly do not spoil your child future.
SNBP is a good school.The bathrooms could be cleaner.Otherwise nice school.

Beware of falling prey to the allure of so-called "best" or "award-winning" schools; This SNBP group is purely driven by commercial interests. In these institutions, you may find yourself devoid of the basic right to meet the principal, and open house events are mere formalities with no meaningful follow-up on the feedback, complaints, or suggestions you may have voiced.

Even a single missed fees instalment can result in harsh penalties, and your genuine reasons for the delay often fall on deaf ears. The school's approach to financial matters seems unyielding, showing little consideration for individual circumstances.

Furthermore, the absence of free activities, such as sports, dance, and music, is disappointing. Adding insult to injury, the recent imposition of charges for the annual function is not only unacceptable but also unlawful. It reflects a concerning trend where even essential components of a child's education and well-being are commodified for profit.

In light of these issues, it's essential to carefully weigh the true value of the education provided by such institutions and consider alternative options that prioritize the holistic development and well-being of students over profit-driven motives.

Good infrastructure, good facilities but teachers dont pay attention on each and every student
Too wast syllabus, overcrowded school hence teacher can't handle every child. No progress in student. Teachers take leaves frequently hence portion lack behind. No overall development of kids. Just looks good school as per infrastructure wise think before taking admission. After complaining in every PTM about different issues no positive signs from school. Else fees and everything is manageable if they take care of each child.

Worst school. Please double check before you take admission . teachers are not proficient, they are not able to clear concepts. They just write in black board and teachers don't care to check whether student is writing or not or they understood. They just put the content in ERP and they leave every thing on parents responsibility.
I did a mistake and took addmission by seeing its near to my home but later realize it's all gone wrong starting from drop / pick up , education and the space they have in name of play ground.
So just make sure to check all this facts before taking admission.

Stupid school. They don't even teach properly always yelling and Punishing for no reason.I recommend don't join this Rude And Very Very VERY bad School.The fees are so much expensive.Its Very Rude and greedy. DONT EVER TRY TO ADMIT YOUR CHILD TO THIS SCHOOL
.
